Agent Smith

Agent Smith is the guy who has the mission to take down targets shown in the map. This is a simulation full of shooting speed, weapons, enemies and items that will help gaining experience. Complete every mission before the time is up, gain the recommended score and find the package. You need to move very fast because the enemies are in big number trying to put you down.

Play Agent Smith Online

Loading game...
About Agent Smith

Agent Smith is the guy who has the mission to take down targets shown in the map. This is a simulation full of shooting speed, weapons, enemies and items that will help gaining experience. Complete every mission before the time is up, gain the recommended score and find the package. You need to move very fast because the enemies are in big number trying to put you down. This browser game page adds original guidance and context so players can understand the challenge before the embedded game loads.

How to Play
  • Press play to load Agent Smith in your browser.
  • Use the controls shown inside the game.
  • Keep practicing to improve your score and progress.
Game Features
Instant browser play Action game category Free online gameplay No download required
Frequently Asked Questions

Can I play Agent Smith for free?

Yes. Agent Smith is available as a free browser game on ArcadeNest.

Do I need to install Agent Smith?

No installation is required. The game runs inside the browser iframe.
